tasks.Name: Define Aircraft Functions
tasks.Description: Identify all aircraft-level functions that will be allocated to systems and software, establishing the top-level functional decomposition.

tasks.Name: Develop System Requirements
tasks.Description: Derive and document system requirements from aircraft functions and operational requirements, including functional, performance, safety, and interface requirements.

tasks.Name: Define System Architecture
tasks.Description: Establish the system architecture to meet the system requirements, considering hardware, software, and interfaces.

tasks.Name: Allocate System-to-Software Requirements
tasks.Description: Allocate system requirements to software components, ensuring traceability and completeness.

tasks.Name: Plan System-Level Verification
tasks.Description: Develop a verification plan to ensure the system meets its requirements, including test strategies and methods.

tasks.Name: Define System Interfaces
tasks.Description: Identify and document all system interfaces, ensuring compatibility and integration with other systems.

tasks.Name: Identify Aircraft-Level Functions
tasks.Description: Identify and list all aircraft-level functions based on operational requirements.

tasks.Name: Allocate Functions to Systems
tasks.Description: Allocate identified aircraft-level functions to specific systems and software components.

tasks.Name: Establish Functional Decomposition
tasks.Description: Establish the top-level functional decomposition of the aircraft functions.

tasks.Name: Derive Functional Requirements
tasks.Description: Derive functional requirements from aircraft functions and operational requirements.

tasks.Name: Derive Performance Requirements
tasks.Description: Derive performance requirements based on operational needs and constraints.

tasks.Name: Derive Safety Requirements
tasks.Description: Derive safety requirements to ensure compliance with safety standards.

tasks.Name: Derive Interface Requirements
tasks.Description: Derive interface requirements to ensure proper integration with other systems.

tasks.Name: Document System Requirements
tasks.Description: Compile and document all derived requirements into the System Requirements Specification.

tasks.Name: Analyze System Requirements
tasks.Description: Analyze the system requirements to identify architectural needs and constraints.

tasks.Name: Design Hardware Architecture
tasks.Description: Design the hardware architecture to meet identified needs and constraints.

tasks.Name: Design Software Architecture
tasks.Description: Design the software architecture to meet identified needs and constraints.

tasks.Name: Define System Interfaces
tasks.Description: Define the interfaces between hardware and software components.

tasks.Name: Compile System Architecture Description
tasks.Description: Compile the hardware, software, and interface designs into the System Architecture Description.

tasks.Name: Analyze System Requirements for Software Allocation
tasks.Description: Analyze system requirements to determine which can be allocated to software components.

tasks.Name: Allocate Requirements to Software Components
tasks.Description: Allocate analyzed system requirements to specific software components.

tasks.Name: Ensure Traceability and Completeness
tasks.Description: Ensure traceability and completeness of allocated software requirements.

tasks.Name: Identify Verification Objectives
tasks.Description: Identify the objectives for system-level verification based on system requirements.

tasks.Name: Select Verification Methods
tasks.Description: Select appropriate verification methods to achieve the identified objectives.

tasks.Name: Develop Test Strategies
tasks.Description: Develop test strategies to implement the selected verification methods.

tasks.Name: Compile System Verification Plan
tasks.Description: Compile the verification objectives, methods, and test strategies into the System Verification Plan.

tasks.Name: Identify System Interfaces
tasks.Description: Identify all interfaces required for system integration based on the System Architecture Description.

tasks.Name: Document System Interfaces
tasks.Description: Document the identified system interfaces in the Interface Control Document.

tasks.Name: Develop Software Plans
tasks.Description: Develop the software plans including PSAC, SDP, SVP, SCMP, and SQAP to guide the software development process.
Outputs: Plan for Software Aspects of Certification (PSAC)

tasks.Name: Develop High-Level Requirements
tasks.Description: Develop high-level software requirements from system requirements ensuring traceability.

tasks.Name: Develop Low-Level Requirements
tasks.Description: Develop low-level software requirements from high-level requirements ensuring traceability.

tasks.Name: Implement Software Architecture
tasks.Description: Implement the software architecture based on the design to support software requirements.

tasks.Name: Implement Source Code
tasks.Description: Develop source code from low-level requirements ensuring traceability and compliance with coding standards.

tasks.Name: Conduct Software Verification
tasks.Description: Perform unit and integration testing, and conduct coverage analysis to verify the software.

tasks.Name: Perform Configuration Management
tasks.Description: Manage software configuration items to ensure integrity and traceability throughout the software lifecycle.

tasks.Name: Conduct Software Quality Assurance
tasks.Description: Ensure compliance with software quality assurance processes and standards.

tasks.Name: Analyze Aircraft Functions
tasks.Description: Analyze the identified aircraft-level functions to determine allocation criteria.

tasks.Name: Allocate Functions to Systems
tasks.Description: Allocate aircraft functions to specific systems based on the established criteria.

tasks.Name: Allocate Functions to Software Components
tasks.Description: Allocate aircraft functions to specific software components ensuring alignment with system allocations.

tasks.Name: Compile Allocated Aircraft Function List
tasks.Description: Compile the allocated functions into a comprehensive list for further development.

tasks.Name: Identify Hardware-Software Interface Requirements
tasks.Description: Identify the specific interface requirements between hardware and software components based on architecture descriptions.

tasks.Name: Design Hardware-Software Interfaces
tasks.Description: Design the interfaces between hardware and software components to meet identified requirements.

tasks.Name: Document System Interface Description
tasks.Description: Document the designed interfaces in the System Interface Description.

tasks.Name: Integrate Hardware Architecture
tasks.Description: Integrate the hardware architecture description into the System Architecture Description.

tasks.Name: Integrate Software Architecture
tasks.Description: Integrate the software architecture description into the System Architecture Description.

tasks.Name: Integrate System Interfaces
tasks.Description: Integrate the system interface description into the System Architecture Description.

tasks.Name: Compile Final System Architecture Description
tasks.Description: Compile the integrated hardware, software, and interface architectures into the final System Architecture Description.

tasks.Name: Review System Requirements
tasks.Description: Review the System Requirements Specification to identify potential software allocations.

tasks.Name: Identify Software-Allocable Requirements
tasks.Description: Identify requirements from the reviewed system requirements that can be allocated to software components.

tasks.Name: Document Software Allocation Analysis
tasks.Description: Document the analysis of system requirements for software allocation.

tasks.Name: Review Software Allocation Analysis
tasks.Description: Review the Software Allocation Analysis to understand the system requirements allocated to software components.

tasks.Name: Assign Requirements to Software Components
tasks.Description: Assign each analyzed requirement to the appropriate software component based on the allocation analysis.

tasks.Name: Document Allocated Software Requirements
tasks.Description: Document the allocated software requirements for each component in a structured format.

tasks.Name: Establish Requirement Traceability
tasks.Description: Establish traceability from allocated software requirements to system requirements.

tasks.Name: Verify Requirement Completeness
tasks.Description: Verify that all allocated software requirements are complete and address all necessary aspects.

tasks.Name: Compile Software Requirements Specification
tasks.Description: Compile the traceability matrix and completeness verification into the Software Requirements Specification.

tasks.Name: Review Verification Objectives
tasks.Description: Review the verification objectives to understand the scope and requirements for verification.

tasks.Name: Identify Potential Verification Methods
tasks.Description: Identify potential verification methods that can be applied to meet the reviewed objectives.

tasks.Name: Evaluate Verification Methods
tasks.Description: Evaluate the identified verification methods for feasibility and effectiveness.

tasks.Name: Select Final Verification Methods
tasks.Description: Select the most appropriate verification methods from the evaluated options.

tasks.Name: Review Verification Methods
tasks.Description: Review the selected verification methods to understand their requirements and constraints.

tasks.Name: Identify Test Strategy Components
tasks.Description: Identify the components and elements required for developing test strategies based on the reviewed methods.

tasks.Name: Develop Test Strategy Framework
tasks.Description: Develop a framework for the test strategies incorporating identified components and system architecture.

tasks.Name: Document Test Strategies
tasks.Description: Document the developed test strategies in a structured format for implementation.

tasks.Name: Develop PSAC
tasks.Description: Develop the Plan for Software Aspects of Certification (PSAC) to outline the certification approach.
Outputs: Plan for Software Aspects of Certification (PSAC)

tasks.Name: Develop SDP
tasks.Description: Develop the Software Development Plan (SDP) to define the software development lifecycle and processes.

tasks.Name: Develop SVP
tasks.Description: Develop the Software Verification Plan (SVP) to specify verification activities and methods.

tasks.Name: Develop SCMP
tasks.Description: Develop the Software Configuration Management Plan (SCMP) to manage software configuration items.

tasks.Name: Develop SQAP
tasks.Description: Develop the Software Quality Assurance Plan (SQAP) to ensure software quality processes are followed.

tasks.Name: Code Software Modules
tasks.Description: Develop code for individual software modules based on the software architecture design.

tasks.Name: Integrate Software Modules
tasks.Description: Integrate coded software modules to form the complete software architecture implementation.

tasks.Name: Verify Software Architecture Implementation
tasks.Description: Verify the integrated software architecture implementation against the design and requirements.

tasks.Name: Perform Unit Testing
tasks.Description: Conduct unit testing on individual software components to verify their functionality against requirements.

tasks.Name: Perform Integration Testing
tasks.Description: Conduct integration testing to verify the interaction between integrated software components.

tasks.Name: Conduct Coverage Analysis
tasks.Description: Perform coverage analysis to ensure that the software code has been adequately tested.

tasks.Name: Establish Configuration Baselines
tasks.Description: Define and establish baselines for software configuration items as per the SCMP.

tasks.Name: Control Configuration Changes
tasks.Description: Manage and document changes to configuration items to maintain integrity.

tasks.Name: Perform Configuration Audits
tasks.Description: Conduct audits to verify that configuration items conform to their specifications.

tasks.Name: Maintain Configuration Records
tasks.Description: Maintain records of configuration status and changes throughout the software lifecycle.

tasks.Name: Review SQAP Compliance
tasks.Description: Review the Software Quality Assurance Plan (SQAP) to ensure it meets DO-178C standards.

tasks.Name: Conduct Process Audits
tasks.Description: Conduct audits of software processes to verify adherence to the SQAP.

tasks.Name: Verify Quality Assurance Records
tasks.Description: Verify that quality assurance records are complete and accurate as per the SQAP.

tasks.Name: Compile Quality Assurance Records
tasks.Description: Compile verified quality assurance records into a structured format.

tasks.Name: Conduct Functional Hazard Assessment (FHA)
tasks.Description: Perform FHA to identify and classify potential failure conditions and their effects on the aircraft.

tasks.Name: Conduct Preliminary System Safety Assessment (PSSA)
tasks.Description: Perform PSSA to evaluate system architecture and identify safety requirements and design constraints.

tasks.Name: Conduct System Safety Assessment (SSA)
tasks.Description: Perform SSA to verify that the implemented system meets safety requirements and mitigates identified hazards.

tasks.Name: Perform Fault Tree Analysis (FTA)
tasks.Description: Conduct FTA to analyze potential faults and their impact on system safety.

tasks.Name: Perform Failure Modes and Effects Analysis (FMEA)
tasks.Description: Conduct FMEA to identify potential failure modes and their effects on system components.

tasks.Name: Perform Common Mode Analysis (CMA)
tasks.Description: Conduct CMA to identify and mitigate common mode failures across system components.

tasks.Name: Derive Safety Requirements and Assign DAL
tasks.Description: Derive safety requirements and assign Design Assurance Levels (DAL) based on safety analysis results.

tasks.Name: Identify Safety-Critical Functions
tasks.Description: Identify functions that are critical to safety based on the Aircraft Function List and Applicable Regulations.

tasks.Name: Analyze Safety-Critical Functions
tasks.Description: Analyze identified safety-critical functions to determine specific safety requirements.

tasks.Name: Derive Safety Requirements
tasks.Description: Derive specific safety requirements from the function safety analysis.

tasks.Name: Review Allocated Software Requirements
tasks.Description: Review the allocated software requirements to ensure all necessary aspects are addressed.

tasks.Name: Identify Missing Requirements
tasks.Description: Identify any missing requirements that are necessary for completeness.

tasks.Name: Document Completeness Verification
tasks.Description: Document the verification of requirement completeness, including identified gaps.

tasks.Name: Identify Potential Failure Conditions
tasks.Description: Identify potential failure conditions for each aircraft function.

tasks.Name: Classify Failure Conditions
tasks.Description: Classify identified failure conditions based on their severity and impact on the aircraft.

tasks.Name: Document FHA Findings
tasks.Description: Document the findings of the Functional Hazard Assessment in a comprehensive report.

tasks.Name: Review PSSA and System Verification Reports
tasks.Description: Review the PSSA and System Verification Reports to gather necessary safety information.

tasks.Name: Verify Safety Requirements Compliance
tasks.Description: Verify that the system implementation complies with safety requirements identified in the PSSA.

tasks.Name: Assess Hazard Mitigation Effectiveness
tasks.Description: Assess the effectiveness of hazard mitigations implemented in the system.

tasks.Name: Compile SSA Report
tasks.Description: Compile the findings from the safety compliance verification and hazard mitigation assessment into the SSA Report.

tasks.Name: Identify Faults for Analysis
tasks.Description: Identify potential faults in the system architecture for inclusion in the fault tree.

tasks.Name: Construct Fault Tree
tasks.Description: Construct the fault tree diagram to represent the logical relationships between identified faults.

tasks.Name: Analyze Fault Tree
tasks.Description: Analyze the fault tree to determine the impact of faults on system safety.

tasks.Name: Identify Failure Modes
tasks.Description: Identify potential failure modes for each system component based on the System Architecture Description.

tasks.Name: Analyze Effects of Failure Modes
tasks.Description: Analyze the effects of identified failure modes on system components and overall system performance.

tasks.Name: Document FMEA Results
tasks.Description: Document the results of the failure modes and effects analysis in a structured format.

tasks.Name: Identify Common Mode Failures
tasks.Description: Identify potential common mode failures across system components using the System Architecture Description and PSSA Report.

tasks.Name: Analyze Common Mode Failures
tasks.Description: Analyze the identified common mode failures to assess their impact on system safety.

tasks.Name: Mitigate Common Mode Failures
tasks.Description: Develop and document mitigation strategies for the identified common mode failures.

tasks.Name: Derive Safety Requirements
tasks.Description: Derive specific safety requirements from safety analysis results to ensure compliance with safety standards.

tasks.Name: Assign Design Assurance Levels (DAL)
tasks.Description: Assign Design Assurance Levels (DAL) to system components based on derived safety requirements.

tasks.Name: Conduct System Validation
tasks.Description: Perform validation activities to ensure the system meets the intended operational needs and requirements.

tasks.Name: Develop Software High-Level Requirements
tasks.Description: Develop software high-level requirements from system requirements ensuring traceability.

tasks.Name: Develop Software Low-Level Requirements
tasks.Description: Develop software low-level requirements from high-level requirements ensuring traceability.

tasks.Name: Design Software Architecture
tasks.Description: Design the software architecture to meet high-level requirements.

tasks.Name: Generate Executable Object Code
tasks.Description: Compile and link the source code to generate executable object code.

tasks.Name: Develop Software Verification Cases and Procedures
tasks.Description: Develop verification cases and procedures to verify software requirements.

tasks.Name: Conduct Structural Coverage Analysis
tasks.Description: Perform structural coverage analysis to ensure all code structures are exercised.

tasks.Name: Establish Traceability from HLR to LLR
tasks.Description: Establish bidirectional traceability from high-level to low-level requirements.

tasks.Name: Establish Traceability from LLR to Source Code
tasks.Description: Establish bidirectional traceability from low-level requirements to source code.

tasks.Name: Compile Software Configuration Index
tasks.Description: Compile the Software Configuration Index (SCI) to list all configuration items.

tasks.Name: Compile Software Accomplishment Summary
tasks.Description: Compile the Software Accomplishment Summary (SAS) to summarize the software development and verification activities.

tasks.Name: Allocate System Requirements to Subsystems
tasks.Description: Allocate system requirements to specific subsystems, ensuring traceability and completeness.

tasks.Name: Develop System Verification Procedures
tasks.Description: Develop procedures for system verification to ensure requirements are met.

tasks.Name: Conduct System Verification
tasks.Description: Execute system verification procedures to validate system performance and compliance.

tasks.Name: Review Interface Control Document
tasks.Description: Review the Interface Control Document to ensure all interfaces are correctly defined and documented.

tasks.Name: Review Operational Requirements
tasks.Description: Review the aircraft-level operational requirements to understand functional needs.

tasks.Name: Identify Functions
tasks.Description: Identify potential aircraft-level functions from the reviewed operational requirements.

tasks.Name: Compile Function List
tasks.Description: Compile the identified functions into a preliminary aircraft function list.

tasks.Name: Review Allocated Aircraft Functions
tasks.Description: Review the allocated aircraft functions to ensure completeness and accuracy.

tasks.Name: Identify Top-Level Functions
tasks.Description: Identify top-level functions from the reviewed aircraft functions.

tasks.Name: Document Functional Decomposition
tasks.Description: Document the top-level functional decomposition of the aircraft functions.

tasks.Name: Review Aircraft Functions
tasks.Description: Review the aircraft function list to understand the functional context.

tasks.Name: Identify Functional Requirements
tasks.Description: Identify functional requirements based on the reviewed aircraft functions and applicable regulations.

tasks.Name: Document Functional Requirements
tasks.Description: Document the identified functional requirements in a structured format.

tasks.Name: Review Aircraft Functions and Regulations
tasks.Description: Review the aircraft function list and applicable regulations to understand interface requirements.

tasks.Name: Identify Interface Requirements
tasks.Description: Identify specific interface requirements based on the reviewed interface context.

tasks.Name: Document Interface Requirements
tasks.Description: Document the identified interface requirements in a structured format.

tasks.Name: Compile Derived Requirements
tasks.Description: Compile all derived requirements from functional, performance, safety, and interface categories.

tasks.Name: Document System Requirements Specification
tasks.Description: Document the compiled derived requirements into the System Requirements Specification.

tasks.Name: Review System Requirements
tasks.Description: Review the System Requirements Specification to understand the architectural needs.

tasks.Name: Identify Architectural Needs
tasks.Description: Identify architectural needs based on the reviewed system requirements.

tasks.Name: Identify Architectural Constraints
tasks.Description: Identify architectural constraints imposed by the system requirements.

tasks.Name: Compile Architectural Needs and Constraints
tasks.Description: Compile the identified architectural needs and constraints into a structured document.

tasks.Name: Review Architectural Needs and Constraints
tasks.Description: Review the architectural needs and constraints to understand the hardware design requirements.

tasks.Name: Develop Hardware Architecture Concepts
tasks.Description: Develop initial hardware architecture concepts based on the reviewed needs and constraints.

tasks.Name: Evaluate Hardware Architecture Concepts
tasks.Description: Evaluate the developed hardware architecture concepts for feasibility and compliance.

tasks.Name: Select Final Hardware Architecture
tasks.Description: Select the final hardware architecture based on the evaluation results.

tasks.Name: Document Hardware Architecture Description
tasks.Description: Document the selected hardware architecture in a structured format.

tasks.Name: Review System Requirements
tasks.Description: Review the System Requirements Specification to understand verification needs.

tasks.Name: Identify Verification Needs
tasks.Description: Identify specific verification needs based on the reviewed system requirements.

tasks.Name: Define Verification Objectives
tasks.Description: Define verification objectives to address identified verification needs.

tasks.Name: Compile Verification Objectives
tasks.Description: Gather and organize verification objectives into a structured format for inclusion in the System Verification Plan.

tasks.Name: Compile Verification Methods
tasks.Description: Gather and organize verification methods into a structured format for inclusion in the System Verification Plan.

tasks.Name: Compile Test Strategies
tasks.Description: Gather and organize test strategies into a structured format for inclusion in the System Verification Plan.

tasks.Name: Integrate Verification Plan Components
tasks.Description: Integrate compiled objectives, methods, and strategies into the final System Verification Plan.

tasks.Name: Review System Architecture Description
tasks.Description: Review the System Architecture Description to understand integration needs.

tasks.Name: Identify Interface Points
tasks.Description: Identify specific interface points required for system integration.

tasks.Name: Analyze Interface Requirements
tasks.Description: Analyze the identified interface points to determine specific requirements.

tasks.Name: Compile Identified System Interfaces
tasks.Description: Compile the analyzed interface requirements into a structured list of system interfaces.

tasks.Name: Review Identified System Interfaces
tasks.Description: Review the identified system interfaces to ensure completeness and accuracy.

tasks.Name: Compile Interface Control Document
tasks.Description: Compile the reviewed system interfaces into the Interface Control Document.

tasks.Name: Review Aircraft Functions
tasks.Description: Review the preliminary aircraft function list to understand the context for allocation.

tasks.Name: Identify Allocation Criteria
tasks.Description: Identify criteria for allocating aircraft functions to systems and components.

tasks.Name: Document Function Allocation Criteria
tasks.Description: Document the identified allocation criteria for aircraft functions.

tasks.Name: Review Function Allocation Criteria
tasks.Description: Review the function allocation criteria to ensure they are suitable for system allocation.

tasks.Name: Identify System Allocation Options
tasks.Description: Identify potential systems to which functions can be allocated based on the reviewed criteria.

tasks.Name: Select System for Function Allocation
tasks.Description: Select the most appropriate system for each function based on the identified options.

tasks.Name: Document System Function Allocation
tasks.Description: Document the allocation of functions to systems in a structured format.

tasks.Name: Review System Function Allocation
tasks.Description: Review the system function allocation to identify functions that need to be allocated to software components.

tasks.Name: Identify Software Component Allocation Options
tasks.Description: Identify potential software components for function allocation based on the reviewed system function allocation.

tasks.Name: Select Software Components for Function Allocation
tasks.Description: Select the most appropriate software components for each function based on identified options.

tasks.Name: Document Software Component Function Allocation
tasks.Description: Document the allocation of functions to software components in a structured format.

tasks.Name: Review Software Component Function Allocation
tasks.Description: Review the software component function allocation to ensure all functions are correctly assigned.

tasks.Name: Compile Comprehensive Function List
tasks.Description: Compile the reviewed function allocations into a comprehensive list for further development.

tasks.Name: Review Architecture Descriptions
tasks.Description: Review the hardware and software architecture descriptions to understand interface requirements.

tasks.Name: Identify Interface Requirements
tasks.Description: Identify specific interface requirements between hardware and software based on reviewed architecture descriptions.

tasks.Name: Document Hardware-Software Interface Requirements
tasks.Description: Document the identified interface requirements in a structured format.

tasks.Name: Review Interface Requirements
tasks.Description: Review the hardware-software interface requirements to understand design needs.

tasks.Name: Develop Interface Design Concepts
tasks.Description: Develop initial design concepts for hardware-software interfaces based on reviewed requirements.

tasks.Name: Evaluate Interface Design Concepts
tasks.Description: Evaluate the developed interface design concepts for feasibility and compliance.

tasks.Name: Select Final Interface Design
tasks.Description: Select the final interface design based on evaluation results.

tasks.Name: Document Hardware-Software Interface Design
tasks.Description: Document the selected hardware-software interface design in a structured format.

tasks.Name: Review Interface Design
tasks.Description: Review the hardware-software interface design to ensure it meets system requirements.

tasks.Name: Compile System Interface Description
tasks.Description: Compile the reviewed interface design into the System Interface Description document.

tasks.Name: Review Hardware Architecture Description
tasks.Description: Review the hardware architecture description to understand integration requirements.

tasks.Name: Identify Integration Requirements
tasks.Description: Identify specific requirements for integrating the hardware architecture into the system architecture.

tasks.Name: Integrate Hardware Architecture
tasks.Description: Integrate the hardware architecture into the system architecture based on identified requirements.

tasks.Name: Review Software Architecture Description
tasks.Description: Review the software architecture description to understand integration requirements.

tasks.Name: Identify Integration Requirements
tasks.Description: Identify specific requirements for integrating the software architecture into the system architecture.

tasks.Name: Integrate Software Architecture
tasks.Description: Integrate the software architecture into the system architecture based on identified requirements.

tasks.Name: Review System Interface Description
tasks.Description: Review the System Interface Description to understand integration requirements.

tasks.Name: Identify Integration Requirements
tasks.Description: Identify specific requirements for integrating the system interfaces into the system architecture.

tasks.Name: Integrate System Interfaces
tasks.Description: Integrate the system interfaces into the system architecture based on identified requirements.

tasks.Name: Review Integrated Architectures
tasks.Description: Review the integrated hardware, software, and interface architectures to ensure completeness and consistency.

tasks.Name: Compile System Architecture Description
tasks.Description: Compile the reviewed integrated architectures into the final System Architecture Description document.

tasks.Name: Review System Requirements Specification
tasks.Description: Examine the System Requirements Specification to ensure clarity and completeness.

tasks.Name: Identify Potential Software Allocations
tasks.Description: Identify requirements within the reviewed specification that can be allocated to software components.

tasks.Name: Review System Requirements for Software Allocation
tasks.Description: Review the system requirements to identify those suitable for software allocation.

tasks.Name: Analyze Software-Allocable Requirements
tasks.Description: Analyze identified requirements to confirm their suitability for allocation to software components.

tasks.Name: Review Software-Allocable Requirements
tasks.Description: Review the software-allocable requirements to ensure they are suitable for documentation.

tasks.Name: Compile Software Allocation Analysis
tasks.Description: Compile the reviewed software-allocable requirements into the Software Allocation Analysis document.

tasks.Name: Examine Software Allocation Analysis
tasks.Description: Examine the Software Allocation Analysis to identify key system requirements allocated to software components.

tasks.Name: Verify Allocation Completeness
tasks.Description: Verify that all system requirements have been adequately allocated to software components.

tasks.Name: Document Review Findings
tasks.Description: Document the findings from the review of the Software Allocation Analysis.

tasks.Name: Review Analyzed Requirements
tasks.Description: Review each analyzed requirement to understand its allocation context.

tasks.Name: Determine Appropriate Software Component
tasks.Description: Determine the most suitable software component for each reviewed requirement.

tasks.Name: Assign Requirements to Components
tasks.Description: Assign each requirement to the identified software component based on the decision.

tasks.Name: Review Allocated Software Requirements
tasks.Description: Review the allocated software requirements to ensure they are ready for traceability analysis.

tasks.Name: Identify Traceability Links
tasks.Description: Identify traceability links between allocated software requirements and system requirements.

tasks.Name: Document Traceability Matrix
tasks.Description: Document the identified traceability links in a traceability matrix.

tasks.Name: Review Test Strategy Components
tasks.Description: Review the identified test strategy components to understand their integration into the framework.

tasks.Name: Analyze System Architecture for Test Framework
tasks.Description: Analyze the system architecture to determine its influence on the test strategy framework.
Outputs: System Architecture Analysis for Test Framework

tasks.Name: Integrate Components into Test Strategy Framework
tasks.Description: Integrate the reviewed components and system architecture analysis into the test strategy framework.
Inputs: System Architecture Analysis for Test Framework

tasks.Name: Document Test Strategy Framework
tasks.Description: Document the integrated test strategy framework in a structured format.
